reason: Backend quality check conventions (no lint/CI; pytest on pure logic) for verifying new endpoints
Verify HTTPException status codes (422/404) and category validation match existing patterns
Frontend quality bar (lint, build, forbidden patterns) for verifying components and hooks
Verify new ui/checkbox.tsx, ui/alert-dialog.tsx follow shadcn conventions
Verify new Bulk*Result types align with backend response shape
Cross-layer consistency check: snake_case body fields, response schema alignment
